creator: gnats-admin@FreeBSD.org
text:
I apologize for taking a couple of days after the bot has informed me of the update, but I had to contact the author to make sure that this was an actual release, as it is not yet listed on the website.

It is going to be an official release as soon as the updated documentation is compiled; the author doesn't want to add it to the website before that, but the binary itself is a release.

Fix: Patch file is attached.

Patch attached with submission follows:
How-To-Repeat: n/a
